title: Psychrophyton hectorii
taxonomy: Psychrophyton hectorii is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant family. The genus Psychrophyton is native to Western Australia. Psychrophyton hectorii is a succulent shrub with leaves that are typically 2-10 mm long and are arranged oppositely on the stem. The classification of Psychrophyton hectorii is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, and the family Aizoaceae. The plant's classification reflects its adaptation to the dry, sandy soils of its native Western Australian habitat.
